title: oxalis latifolia subsp. latifolia
intro: Oxalis latifolia subsp. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved wood-sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones. Oxalis latifolia subsp. latifolia can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its various medicinal properties.
